docs_static.description: Documentation, copy, simple static HTML/CSS, placeholders, comments, and visual polish.

ui_workflow.description: Normal UI, forms, dashboard logic, filtering, reports, workflow design, and routine app behavior.

backend_api_data.description: Backend, API, SQL, schema, migration, data transformation, report, import, and bot logic.

auth_security_admin.description: Authentication, authorization, roles, admin users, permissions, security controls, credentials, and secrets.

integration_write.description: External-system writes and high-risk integrations such as Laserfiche, TeamDynamix, Graph, Intune, email sending, file transfer, and deployment.

sensitive_records.description: PII, veteran, worker comp, HR/payroll, public safety, legal, employee, student raw comment, and other sensitive record work.

public_official_content.description: Official public budget, transparency, and other public-facing civic content where figures and claims need source verification.
